nodes.name: Config: Client Settings
nodes.notes: Layer 3 — edit these values per client. Do not modify nodes downstream of this point.

nodes.name: Adapter: Get Transcript
nodes.notes: Swap adapter name here when client uses Fathom or Gong: adapter.transcript.get-transcript.fathom

nodes.name: Adapter: Get CRM Contacts
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.crm.get-contacts.salesforce if client is on Salesforce

parameters.name: system
parameters.value:
You are a meeting intelligence assistant. Analyze the provided meeting transcript and return a structured JSON object with the following fields:
- summary (string): 3-5 sentence executive summary
- action_items (array): each item has { owner, task, deadline_mentioned }
- decisions (array of strings): key decisions made
- commitments (array): each item has { who, what }
- key_topics (array of strings)
- themes (array of strings, e.g. 'competitive', 'pricing', 'renewal', 'technical-issue')
- sentiment (string): 'positive', 'neutral', or 'negative'
- open_questions (array of strings)

Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown fencing or preamble.

nodes.name: Claude: AI Analysis
nodes.notes: Credential: Anthropic API key stored in n8n Credentials store. Header name: x-api-key

nodes.name: Adapter: Get Email Context
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.email.get-thread.outlook if client is on Outlook. Graceful skip on failure — downstream code handles missing email_context.

nodes.name: Adapter: Write Meeting Record to CRM
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.crm.write-note.salesforce if client is on Salesforce

value.subject: =⚡ Action Items from: {{ $json.title }}

nodes.name: Adapter: Send Action Items Email
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.email.send.outlook if client is on Outlook

value.subject: =🚨 Risk Alert: {{ $json.title }}

nodes.name: Adapter: Send Risk Alert Email
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.email.send.outlook if client is on Outlook

value.subject: =📋 Meeting Summary: {{ $json.title }}

nodes.name: Adapter: Send Meeting Summary Email
nodes.notes: Swap for adapter.email.send.outlook if client is on Outlook

main.node: Adapter: Write Meeting Record to CRM
